content:
```json
[
  {
    "name": "Fujisan Yumeno Ohashi Bridge",
    "full_address": "Fujisan Yumeno Ohashi Bridge, Fujinomiya, Shizuoka Prefecture, Japan",
    "image": "https://www.shutterstock.com/image-photo/fujisan-yumeno-ohashi-bridge-japan-1368891330.jpg",
    "order": 1
  }
]
```

**Explanation**

The name of each location was extracted from the caption using the `.text` attribute. The full address was extracted by combining the name of the location with the name of the city or region in which it is located. The order of each location was extracted by counting the number of times the location was mentioned in the caption.

For example, the name of the first location is "Fujisan Yumeno Ohashi Bridge". The full address is "Fujisan Yumeno Ohashi Bridge, Fujinomiya, Shizuoka Prefecture, Japan". The order is 1, because the location is mentioned first in the caption.

The same process was applied to all one locations. The resulting JSON file contains a single object.
